title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! Move it, buster! Who the hell do you think you are?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got a mountain of bones to pick with you lot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This is the end, I guess.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Let's get out there and fight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought that I could just smooth all this over by just sacrificing myself... what a joke

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 18 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
